name: Gorgias
description: Customer support helpdesk platform for ecommerce teams (tickets, customers, integrations, automation).

auth_methods.note: Docs explicitly describe private apps using API keys (HTTP Basic or Bearer) and public apps using OAuth2 Bearer tokens.

credential_access.note: Help Center shows API keys can be created from the dashboard (Settings → Integrations → API & Webhooks). This implies a developer user can self-serve to obtain keys; pricing pages do not state API is gated.

api_surface.note: The developer reference lists endpoints for accounts, tickets, users, customers, integrations and more; OpenAPI spec is available for SDK generation.

buildability.note: Public docs + self-serve API keys or OAuth app registration exist, so integrations can be built today.

queries: Gorgias API keys create dashboard Settings Integrations API & Webhooks
Gorgias REST API reference endpoints tickets customers users
